title: Fex's Vehicle Pack
description: An Addon-Pack for FVTM with various types of vehicles (cars, trucks, trailers & work machines).
body:
### A vehicle pack for [FVTM](https://modrinth.com/mod/fexs-vehicle-mod)!    

1.12.2 -> Forge    
1.20.1 -> Forge    
1.21.+ -> Fabric    

This pack currently contains the following vehicles for FVTM v4:
- C12 / Off-Road / Car
  - all doors are openable
  - 3 color channels (primary, seats, secondary/cargo)
  - 3 cargo bay upgrades
  - optional front/rear bumper
  - 2 types of spot lights (can be installed on roofbar or front bumper)
  - 2 types of roof accessories (roofbar, taxi lights)
- Excavator
  - controllable with WASD and Arrow keys if sitting in the _controller seat_
  - if sitting in the _driver_ seat it's driveable
- C13 / Car
  - all doors are openable
  - all doors and the glove box have an inventory
  - <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_KRqJR-TcMU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
  - [https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1ZANDerEwM](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1ZANDerEwM)
- T3 / Semi-Truck
  - openable doors
  - 2 cab variants (normal cab, extended cab)
  - various axle combinations possible
  - various accessories, fluid tanks or side inventories
  - supports trailers
  - <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1o3TEHLcKls" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
  - [https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1nRQkYoETi](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1nRQkYoETi)
- LK1 / Locomotive
  - simple locomotive compatible with the 30px standard gauge
  - cabin on both ends
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PMigHYNSplw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Planned** vehicles / queued for update to FVTM v4:
- C10 / Generic Sedan / Car
  - openable doors
  - 1 color channel
- T1 / Lorry/Truck
  - openable doors
  - 3 cargo bay upgrades (box / towing / fluid tank)
  - 2 color channels (primary, secondary)
  - 2 alternative liveries
- T2 / Semi-Truck / EU-Type
  - openable doors
  - 1 color channel
  - supports trailers
- TR1 / Truck-Trailer
  - can be town by trucks
  - generic cargo upgrade with openable doors, 2 alternative liveries and 1 color channel

### Videos
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0ePFPnAb1k0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VUQuMcoTXHc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Dependencies:
- [FVTM - Fex's Vehicle and Transportation Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/fexs-vehicle-mod)
- [GEP - General Essentials Pack](https://modrinth.com/mod/gep)

Please note this pack has **no** car engines and fuels, you need GEP for that!
